codeReview.summary: The implementation is limited to README.md and config.example.yaml and satisfies the OpenCode Zen config/docs-only contract. Zen is documented as an openai-compatibility provider with base URL https://opencode.ai/zen/v1, placeholder <OPENCODE_API_KEY>, Zen-specific prefix/alias values, chat-completions-only scope, and explicit exclusion of OAuth/auth-file/first-class OpenCode support. The commit introduces no OpenCode-specific runtime/auth/translator/registry/cmd/sdk changes and the worker's verification stayed local/static.

summary: PASS: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, validation contract, shared state files, and commit diff. Static inspection confirms VAL-OCZEN-001 through VAL-OCZEN-006 are met with no blocking or non-blocking code review issues.
